description.unified: Rapidly stabs the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG. Upon a Crit Hit, stacks 1 Wound and resets cooldown. Per every stacked Wound, DMG dealt by Float Like a Butterfly is increased by 20%. Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is in use.
Dispels negative effects from self and increases ATK by ??? for [15sec->20 sec] and increases Crit Chance by 500. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Inflicts ??? P.DMG upon enemy with a continuous attack. The last hit blows the enemy away.
Upon a Crit Hit, ATK is increased by ??? for 10 sec. Can be stacked up to 8 times max.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1 and Wound stack max is changed to 10. Deals 150% of ATK as extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds.

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Crit Chance effect is changed to a [65%->100%] Crit DMG boost. Also gains a [30%->25%] DMG boost towards Bosses.
When holding 5 stacks, takes 20% reduced DMG.

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's P.Block chance by 500 for 10 sec.
[Shooting Star] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon Crit Hit, mana is recovered by [(added) 200].

dark.unified: Upon using a Skill, increases own Crit DMG by [7%->10%] for 10 sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.

description.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} and Crit DMG is increased by {1}% for 15 sec. Can be stacked up to [8->5] times max.
